title: NMDC Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 11 Specialist, Pharmacist Posts
description: The NMDC Apollo Central Hospitals have officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 11 Nephrologists, Specialists, General Duty Medical Officers, Staff Nurses, Assistant Pharmacists, Dressers, and Female Attendants. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, MD/MS, DNB, B. Pharm, D. Pharm, B.Sc Nursing, GNM, 12th, or 10th can apply for the NMDC Notificatio...
